prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response: In a colorful ocean, where coral reefs swayed and fish darted by, there lived an octopus named Ollie. Ollie loved watching his neighbors play together - the seahorses chasing each other, the starfish having a picnic, and the crabs playing hide-and-seek. But whenever Ollie saw someone he wanted to say hello to, his tentacles would curl up tightly and his eyes would get wide with worry. "What if they don't want to be friends?" Ollie worried. "What if I'm too...soft and squishy? Or what if they think my eight arms are weird?" As the other sea creatures waved and said hello, Ollie would hide behind a rock, too shy to come out and join the fun. But one day, Ollie decided that he couldn't hide forever. He wanted to make some friends and have adventures of his own! If only he could find the courage to come out from behind that rock...
